title: Tauntaun Splash-On Cologne
content:
{{Top|leg}}
{{Otheruses|Tauntaun}}
[[File:TauntaunCologne-XWA.png|thumb|right|A bottle of Tauntaun Splash-On Cologne.]]
'''Tauntaun Splash-On Cologne''' was a product exported from [[Hoth/Legends|Hoth]]. The cologne was a commercial failure. A bottle of it made its way into [[Ace Azzameen/Legends|Ace Azzameen's]] cabin.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance]]''

[[Category:Perfumes]]
